rules: Replay must read the exported ZIP directly, not only the working tree.
The promoted pinned-evidence receipt and export binding must exist in the ZIP.
Every bound evidence path must exist in the ZIP.

Exact SHA matches are required for immutable/non-generated artifacts. Mutable generated ledgers may be recorded as replayed-current if the actual ZIP member digest differs from a prior declared digest.
Audit query packs must include ranked evidence paths and digest fields.
